name: rc_reason_msgs
description: Msg and srv definitions for rc_reason_clients

Box.raw:
# Definition of a box

float64 x
float64 y
float64 z

CellFillingLevel.description: Dimensions of the 2D cell in meters
CellFillingLevel.raw:
# Dimensions of the 2D cell in meters
Rectangle cell_size

# Position of the cell center in meters (either in camera or external pose frame)
# The z-coordinate is on the level of the load carrier rim
geometry_msgs/Point cell_position

# Filling level of the cell in percent (100% represents a full cell)
RangeValue level_in_percent

# Free space of the cell in meters (how much space is left until the cell is full)
RangeValue level_free_in_meters

# Represents the percentage of valid pixels in this cell. Between 0 and 1 
float64 coverage

Compartment.description: Definition of a load carrier compartment
Compartment.raw:
# Definition of a load carrier compartment

# The pose of the compartment is relative to the load carrier
geometry_msgs/Pose pose

# Size of the compartment
Box box

DetectedTag.raw:
# Representation of detected tag

# Header
std_msgs/Header header

# Detected tag. The size will be set to the estimated tag size.
Tag tag

# 3D pose of the detected tag
geometry_msgs/PoseStamped pose

# Instance ID of the tag
string instance_id

Grasp.raw:
# Definition of a grasp

# user defined id (name)
string id

# unique id of this grasp
string uuid

# unique id of the match this grasp is associated to
string match_uuid

geometry_msgs/PoseStamped pose

Item.raw:
# Definition of a detected item

string uuid

# Contains uuids of grasps on this object (if requested)
string[] grasp_uuids

string type

# Types
string RECTANGLE=RECTANGLE

# if type==RECTANGLE
Rectangle rectangle

# The pose of the item
geometry_msgs/PoseStamped pose

ItemModel.description: Definition of an item model for the ItemPick and BoxPick components
ItemModel.raw:
# Definition of an item model for the ItemPick and BoxPick components

# Required
string type

# Supported types (depending on component)
string UNKNOWN=UNKNOWN
string RECTANGLE=RECTANGLE

# Only one of those required depending on the selected type
# In case of unknown type, these values defines an optional bounding box for the item
RangeBox unknown
RangeRectangle rectangle

LoadCarrier.description: This represents a detected load carrier by its geometry and its pose
LoadCarrier.raw:
# This represents a detected load carrier by its geometry and its pose

string id

# Optional. The load carrier rim model. The only supported value is STANDARD
string type

# Required
Box outer_dimensions

# Required
Box inner_dimensions

# Optional. If not provided, the rim thickness is computed from the outer and inner dimensions
Rectangle rim_thickness

# Optional. Height of the rim step for rims with an L-profile.
float64 rim_step_height

# Optional. Length of the rim ledge in x and y direction. This requires rim_thickness to be set.
Rectangle rim_ledge

geometry_msgs/PoseStamped pose

# True if a detected load carrier is overfilled. Ignored on setting load carrier.
bool overfilled

LoadCarrierModel.description: This represents a load carrier by its geometry and its pose
LoadCarrierModel.raw:
# This represents a load carrier by its geometry and its pose

string id

# Optional. The load carrier rim model. The only supported value is STANDARD
string type

# Required
Box outer_dimensions

# Required
Box inner_dimensions

# Optional. If not provided, the rim thickness is computed from the outer and inner dimensions
Rectangle rim_thickness

# Optional. Height of the rim step for rims with an L-profile.
float64 rim_step_height

# Optional. Length of the rim ledge in x and y direction. This requires rim_thickness to be set.
Rectangle rim_ledge

# When setting a load carrier, this is the prior if frame_id is not empty (should be 'camera' or 'external')
geometry_msgs/PoseStamped pose

# Optional. Indicates how to interpret the load carrier pose
# If not set and pose is zero, it's equivalent to NO_POSE
# If not set and any value in pose is not zero, it's equivalent to ORIENTATION_PRIOR
# Valid values are:
# NO_POSE
# EXACT_POSE
# ORIENTATION_PRIOR
string pose_type

LoadCarrierWithFillingLevel.description: This represents a detected load carrier with it's filling level
LoadCarrierWithFillingLevel.raw:
# This represents a detected load carrier with it's filling level

string id

# Optional. The load carrier rim model. The only supported value is STANDARD
string type

# Required
Box outer_dimensions

# Required
Box inner_dimensions

# Optional. If not provided, the rim thickness is computed from the outer and inner dimensions
Rectangle rim_thickness

# Optional. Height of the rim step for rims with an L-profile.
float64 rim_step_height

# Optional. Length of the rim ledge in x and y direction. This requires rim_thickness to be set.
Rectangle rim_ledge

geometry_msgs/PoseStamped pose

# True if a detected load carrier is overfilled. Ignored on setting load carrier.
bool overfilled

# Filling level of the whole load carrier
CellFillingLevel overall_filling_level

# Filling level of each load carrier cell
CellFillingLevel[] cells_filling_levels

GridSize filling_level_cell_count

Match.description: id of template which was matched
Match.raw:
# id of template which was matched
string template_id

# unique id of this match
string uuid

geometry_msgs/PoseStamped pose

# associated grasps
string[] grasp_uuids

# how well the object matches the template (-1 if not available)
float64 score

RangeBox.description: Definition of a box with minimum and maximum dimensions
RangeBox.raw:
# Definition of a box with minimum and maximum dimensions

Box min_dimensions
Box max_dimensions

RangeRectangle.description: Definition of a rectangle with minimum and maximum dimensions
RangeRectangle.raw:
# Definition of a rectangle with minimum and maximum dimensions

Rectangle min_dimensions
Rectangle max_dimensions

RangeValue.raw:
float64 min
float64 max
float64 mean

Rectangle.raw:
# Definition of a rectangle

float64 x
float64 y

RegionOfInterest2D.raw:
# 2D Region of Interest.
# If width and height are both 0, the full image is covered

# id of the ROI
string id

# leftmost pixel of the ROI
uint32 offset_x

# topmost pixel of the ROI
uint32 offset_y

# width of ROI
uint32 width

# height of ROI.
uint32 height

RegionOfInterest3D.description: Definition of a 3D region of interest
RegionOfInterest3D.raw:
# Definition of a 3D region of interest

# Optional
string id

# Required
geometry_msgs/PoseStamped pose

shape_msgs/SolidPrimitive primitive

SilhouetteMatchObject.raw:
# ID of the object
string object_id

# ROI in which to detect the object
string region_of_interest_2d_id

SuctionGrasp.description: Definition of a suction grasp for the ItemPick component
SuctionGrasp.raw:
# Definition of a suction grasp for the ItemPick component

string uuid

# Optional
string item_uuid

# The grasp orientation is defined such that:
# - the z axis is the normal of the surface at the grasp position
# - the x axis is directed along the direction of maximum elongation of the surface
# - the y axis is selected to form a right-handed coordinate system
geometry_msgs/PoseStamped pose

# Optional. The quality of the grasp (between 0 and 1)
float64 quality

# Optional. The axis lengths of the biggest ellipse inscribed on the suction surface
float64 max_suction_surface_length
float64 max_suction_surface_width

Tag.raw:
# Tag definition

# ID of the tag.
# For april tags, it is <family>_<tag_id>.
# Available april tag families: 16h5, 25h7, 25h9, 36h10, 36h11.
# Example: april tag family 25h7, tag id 5: 25h7_5.
# For QR codes, it the the data contained in the QR code.
string id

# Side length of the (quadratic) tag.
float64 size

CadMatchDetectObject.description: Description: Triggers detection of an object.
CadMatchDetectObject.raw:
# Description: Triggers detection of an object.

# Required
string template_id

# Required. Pose frame for output poses (valid values are camera and external)
string pose_frame

# Optional
string region_of_interest_id

# Optional
string load_carrier_id

# Optional
Compartment load_carrier_compartment

# Required only if reference frame = external and sensor is robot-mounted
geometry_msgs/Pose robot_pose

# Optional. Enables collision checking of grasps with load carrier
CollisionDetection collision_detection

---

builtin_interfaces/Time timestamp

# List of detected matches (instances) of the object
Match[] matches

Grasp[] grasps

LoadCarrier[] load_carriers

rc_common_msgs/ReturnCode return_code

CalibrateBasePlane.raw:
# Description: Triggers base-plane calibration.

# Required. Pose frame for output poses (valid values are camera and external)
string pose_frame

# Required only if reference frame = external and sensor is robot-mounted
geometry_msgs/Pose robot_pose

# Required. Method to use for base-plane estimation
# Valid values are:
# STEREO
# APRILTAG
# MANUAL
string plane_estimation_method

# Options for STEREO calibration
string stereo_plane_preference

# Optional
string region_of_interest_2d_id

# Optional. Shift in meters that will be applied to the estimated plane
float64 offset

# Reqired only if plane_estimation_method = MANUAL
shape_msgs/Plane plane

---

# timestamp of the image set the calibration ran on
builtin_interfaces/Time timestamp

# frame in which plane is given
string pose_frame
shape_msgs/Plane plane

rc_common_msgs/ReturnCode return_code

ComputeGrasps.description: Description: Triggers the computation of grasp poses for the given items and suction surface.
ComputeGrasps.raw:
# Description: Triggers the computation of grasp poses for the given items and suction surface.

# Required. Pose frame for output poses (valid values are camera and external)
string pose_frame

# Optional
string region_of_interest_id

# Optional
string load_carrier_id

# Optional
Compartment load_carrier_compartment

# Optional. If empty, means one item of type unknown without dimensions
ItemModel[] item_models

# Required. Dimensions of the gripper suction surface
# In case of circular suction cups, the two values are expected to be the same and set to the suction cup diameter
# Different values are expected for grippers with multiple suction cups or non-circular suction cups (e.g. oval cups)
float64 suction_surface_length
float64 suction_surface_width

# Required only if reference frame = external and sensor is robot-mounted
geometry_msgs/Pose robot_pose

# Optional. Enables collision checking of grasps with load carrier
CollisionDetection collision_detection

---

builtin_interfaces/Time timestamp

Item[] items

LoadCarrier[] load_carriers

SuctionGrasp[] grasps

rc_common_msgs/ReturnCode return_code

DeleteBasePlaneCalibration.description: Description: Deletes the configured base-plane calibration.
DeleteBasePlaneCalibration.raw:
# Description: Deletes the configured base-plane calibration.

#No request data
---

rc_common_msgs/ReturnCode return_code

DeleteLoadCarriers.description: Description: Deletes the configured load carriers with the requested ids. If no ids are provided, all configured load...
DeleteLoadCarriers.raw:
# Description: Deletes the configured load carriers with the requested ids. If no ids are provided, all configured load carriers are deleted.

# Optional
string[] load_carrier_ids

---

rc_common_msgs/ReturnCode return_code

DeleteRegionsOfInterest2D.description: Description: Deletes the configured regions of interest with the requested ids. At least one id needs to be provided.
DeleteRegionsOfInterest2D.raw:
# Description: Deletes the configured regions of interest with the requested ids. At least one id needs to be provided.

string[] region_of_interest_2d_ids

---

rc_common_msgs/ReturnCode return_code

DeleteRegionsOfInterest3D.description: Description: Deletes the configured regions of interest with the requested ids. At least one id needs to be provided.
DeleteRegionsOfInterest3D.raw:
# Description: Deletes the configured regions of interest with the requested ids. At least one id needs to be provided.

string[] region_of_interest_ids

---

rc_common_msgs/ReturnCode return_code

DetectFillingLevel.description: Description: Triggers the detection of the given load carriers and their filling level.
DetectFillingLevel.raw:
# Description: Triggers the detection of the given load carriers and their filling level.

# Required. Pose frame for output poses (valid values are camera and external)
string pose_frame

# Optional
string region_of_interest_id

# Optional
string region_of_interest_2d_id

# Required
string[] load_carrier_ids

# Required only if reference frame = external and sensor is robot-mounted
geometry_msgs/Pose robot_pose

# Number of filling level cells to split detected load carriers
GridSize filling_level_cell_count

---

builtin_interfaces/Time timestamp

LoadCarrierWithFillingLevel[] load_carriers

rc_common_msgs/ReturnCode return_code

DetectItems.description: Description: Triggers the detection of the given box model.
DetectItems.raw:
# Description: Triggers the detection of the given box model.

# A valid pose_frame (either camera or external) is required in the request.
# It can be provided either with the pose_frame field, as pose_frame of the selected region of interest
# or as pose_frame of the selected load carriers.
# If more than one pose_frame is provided, they must to be consistent.

# Optional. Pose frame for output poses.
string pose_frame

# Optional
string region_of_interest_id

# Optional
string load_carrier_id

# Optional
Compartment load_carrier_compartment

# Required
ItemModel[] item_models

# Required only if reference frame = external and sensor is robot-mounted
geometry_msgs/Pose robot_pose

---

builtin_interfaces/Time timestamp

Item[] items

LoadCarrier[] load_carriers

rc_common_msgs/ReturnCode return_code

DetectLoadCarriers.description: Description: Triggers the detection of the given load carriers.
DetectLoadCarriers.raw:
# Description: Triggers the detection of the given load carriers.

# Required. Pose frame for output poses (valid values are camera and external)
string pose_frame

# Optional
string region_of_interest_id

# Optional
string region_of_interest_2d_id

# Required
string[] load_carrier_ids

# Required only if reference frame = external and sensor is robot-mounted
geometry_msgs/Pose robot_pose

---

builtin_interfaces/Time timestamp

LoadCarrier[] load_carriers

rc_common_msgs/ReturnCode return_code

DetectTags.description: Description: Triggers a detection for the given tags
DetectTags.raw:
# Description: Triggers a detection for the given tags

# Tags to detect. For pose estimation by homography, the sizes of the tags
# must be set.
Tag[] tags

# Optional. Pose frame for output poses (valid values are 'camera' and 'external', defaults to 'camera')
string pose_frame

# Required only if reference frame = external and sensor is robot-mounted
geometry_msgs/Pose robot_pose

---

# List of detected tags.
DetectedTag[] tags

# Timestamp of the detection
builtin_interfaces/Time timestamp

# Return value
rc_common_msgs/ReturnCode return_code

GetBasePlaneCalibration.description: Description: Returns the configured base-plane calibration.
GetBasePlaneCalibration.raw:
# Description: Returns the configured base-plane calibration.

# Required. Pose frame for output poses (valid values are camera and external)
string pose_frame

# Required only if sensor is robot-mounted
geometry_msgs/Pose robot_pose

---

# frame in which plane is given
string pose_frame
shape_msgs/Plane plane

rc_common_msgs/ReturnCode return_code

GetLoadCarriers.description: Description: Returns the configured load carriers with the requested ids. If no ids are provided, all configured load...
GetLoadCarriers.raw:
# Description: Returns the configured load carriers with the requested ids. If no ids are provided, all configured load carriers are returned.

# Optional
string[] load_carrier_ids

---

LoadCarrierModel[] load_carriers

rc_common_msgs/ReturnCode return_code

GetRegionsOfInterest2D.description: Description: Returns the configured regions of interest with the requested ids. If no ids are provided, all configure...
GetRegionsOfInterest2D.raw:
# Description: Returns the configured regions of interest with the requested ids. If no ids are provided, all configured regions of interest are returned.

# Optional
string[] region_of_interest_2d_ids

---

RegionOfInterest2D[] regions_of_interest

rc_common_msgs/ReturnCode return_code

GetRegionsOfInterest3D.description: Description: Returns the configured regions of interest with the requested ids. If no ids are provided, all configure...
GetRegionsOfInterest3D.raw:
# Description: Returns the configured regions of interest with the requested ids. If no ids are provided, all configured regions of interest are returned.

# Optional
string[] region_of_interest_ids

---

RegionOfInterest3D[] regions_of_interest

rc_common_msgs/ReturnCode return_code

HandEyeCalibration.raw:
# Description: Request hand-eye calibration

#No request data
---
# True if calibration result is valid
bool success
# Internal status:
# 0: Valid calibration returned
# 1: Not enough poses
# 2: Calibration result is not available
int32 status
# Human readable message, for development
string message
# Relative pose of grid with respect to the frame for which the pose was given in the request of SetCalibrationPose
geometry_msgs/Pose pose
# Calibration residual error
float64 error
# Expected translation error given in meter
float64 translation_error_meter
# Expected rotation error in degrees
float64 rotation_error_degree
# True if calibration was done with sensor mounted on robot
bool robot_mounted

HandEyeCalibrationTrigger.raw:
# Description: Trigger action
#like std_srvs/Trigger, with additional status code (to be used for translations of the message)
---
bool success
#0: Success
#1: Saving calibration failed
#2: Calibration result is not available
#3: Reset successful
int32 status
string message

SetHandEyeCalibration.raw:
# Description: Set hand-eye calibration

# Relative pose of grid with respect to the frame for which the pose was given in the request of SetCalibrationPose
geometry_msgs/Pose pose
# True if calibration was done with sensor mounted on robot
bool robot_mounted
---
# True if calibration result is valid
bool success
# Internal status:
# 0: Success
# 7: License not available
# 12: Invalid orientation given, i.e. quaternion must have length 1
int32 status
# Human readable message, for development
string message

SetHandEyeCalibrationPose.description: Description: Save a pose (grid or gripper) for later calibration.
SetHandEyeCalibrationPose.raw:
# Description: Save a pose (grid or gripper) for later calibration.
#Request
#Slot in which the pose-image pair is stored.
#Required for overwriting previously stored data (by using the same slot again).
int32 slot
geometry_msgs/Pose pose

---
#True if grid was detected and stored together with the pose in the given slot
bool success
#Internal status:
#1: Grid detected, pose stored
#3: Grid detected, pose stored. Ready to calibrate
#4: Insufficient detection of the calibration pattern
#8: No image data available
#12: Invalid orientation given (0,0,0)
int32 status
#Human readable message, for development
string message

SetLoadCarrier.description: Description: Persistently sets a load carrier.
SetLoadCarrier.raw:
# Description: Persistently sets a load carrier.

# Required
LoadCarrierModel load_carrier

---

rc_common_msgs/ReturnCode return_code

SetRegionOfInterest2D.description: Description: Sets a 2D region of interest.
SetRegionOfInterest2D.raw:
# Description: Sets a 2D region of interest.

# Required
RegionOfInterest2D region_of_interest_2d

---

rc_common_msgs/ReturnCode return_code

SetRegionOfInterest3D.description: Description: Sets a 3D region of interest.
SetRegionOfInterest3D.raw:
# Description: Sets a 3D region of interest.

# Required
RegionOfInterest3D region_of_interest

---

rc_common_msgs/ReturnCode return_code

SilhouetteMatchDetectObject.description: Description: Triggers detection of an object.
SilhouetteMatchDetectObject.raw:
# Description: Triggers detection of an object.

# Required. Object that is to be detected
SilhouetteMatchObject object_to_detect

# Optional. Shift in meters that will be applied to the calibrated base-plane
float64 offset

# Required. Pose frame for output poses (valid values are camera and external)
string pose_frame

# Required only if reference frame = external and sensor is robot-mounted
geometry_msgs/Pose robot_pose

# Optional
string load_carrier_id

# Optional. Enables collision checking of grasps with load carrier
CollisionDetection collision_detection

---

builtin_interfaces/Time timestamp

# List of detected matches (instances) of the object
Match[] matches

Grasp[] grasps

LoadCarrier[] load_carriers

rc_common_msgs/ReturnCode return_code
